1. dīdhī (connected with √2. dī) cl. 2. Ā. dīdhīte, to shine, be bright,  Dhātup. xxiv, 68 ;
P. adīdhet, 3. pl. adīdhayur, to appear as, resemble (nom.),  RV. v, 40, 5 ; x, 98, 7.

2. dīdhī (cf. √1. dhī and √dhyai) cl. 2. Ā. didhīte, 1. sg. dīdhye ( RV. v, 33, 1 ), p. Pres. dīdhyat ( RV. ii, 20, 1 ) and dīdhyāna ( RV. , often with manasā) to perceive, think, be intent upon;
to wish, desire.
